project.name: llm-langchain4j
project.description: LangChain4j learning backend (ported from llm-chat's Spring AI implementation), split into independently runnable Maven modules: llm-chat-agent (chat, RAG, text-to-SQL), llm-audio (transcription, TTS, voice chat), llm-image (captioning, AI image generation) and llm-playground (classification, extraction, summarization, moderation — LangChain4j capabilities not otherwise exercised by the other modules).
